title: The goose is out
summary: import Aside from "../../components/Aside.astro"; I was browsing HN over my coffee this morning and came across an interesting thread[^1] linking to a post titled When Buddhism Goes Bad [^2]. That wasn't actually the title I read, as on HN the more neutral subtitle – How My Mindf
